creator: gsz@acm.org
text:
Created attachment 180400
update to Lua 5.3.4

Lua 5.3.4 is out! :) It's a bug-fix release of Lua 5.3 and the diffs can be seen at [1].

At the moment there's no additional bug fixes, as usually listed in [2]. I will make sure I submit a new PR when there's.

This PR contains a patch that updates lua53 port to Lua 5.3.4. I've run portlint and poudriere and it looks OK.

If I forgot anything, or further QA is needed, please let me know -- I'm not using FreeBSD on a daily basis at the moment =/, but would love to continue contributing.

[1] https://www.lua.org/work/diffs-lua-5.3.3-lua-5.3.4.html
[2] https://www.lua.org/bugs.html
